授業目的: This course will teach students how to have good academic discussions and basic presentation research skills.This course is divided into two parts:1. Discussions - During class you will discuss topics with your classmates and practice academic discussion skills.Students will prepare and discuss four topics in a small group using the discussion skills presented and practiced in class.   2. Internet Research Presentations - Students will prepare and present two Internet Researches. This will give you the basic skills to confidently give a short English presentation to a small group of people.
到達目標: This course will teach students how to have good academic discussions and basic presentation research skills.  This course is divided into two parts:1. Discussions - During class you will discuss topics with your classmates and practice academic discussion skills.Students will prepare and discuss four topics in a small group using the discussion skills presented and practiced in class.   2. Internet Research Presentations - Students will prepare and present two Internet Researches. This will give you the basic skills to confidently give a short English presentation to a small group of people.
授業方法: Group Activity Speaking Practice/ Pair Work Speaking Practice/ Homework Assignments

トピック.授業外学習2:
Students must prepare homework to be ready to actively participate in class group discussions.
Students MUST have an active email account either with their Kwansei Gakuin email address, gmail, hotmail or yahoomail.

教科書/Required texts0: No Text - The teacher will provide all study materials.
学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: 各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: Your grade will be based on the following Graded-discussion preparation = 40% /  Communication Teacher-eval.= 40% / In Class Activities 20%
